hero.headline:
Stake AZR.
Powered by AI.
hero.sub: AI executes every trade, monitors every stake, and distributes every reward — automatically, around the clock. You earn 0.7% daily while the AI handles the rest.

howItWorks.title: How the AI Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Connect your BSC wallet. AI instantly verifies your identity and assigns a unique .azr handle to your account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI processes your USDT-to-AZR conversion at a fair reserve rate and stakes your tokens — all in a single coordinated flow.
howItWorks.step3Desc: AI tracks your position per second, accrues 0.7% daily rewards, and settles claims and referral commissions instantly.

calculator.title: AI Yield Projector
calculator.sub: See exactly what AI will earn for you at 0.7% daily — no guesswork.
calculator.label: Stake amount (AZR)

features.title: AI-Powered Platform
features.sub: Six ways Azora's AI engine works for you, 24/7.
features.f1Desc: AI monitors every on-chain interaction in real time — detecting anomalies and protecting your staked assets automatically.
features.f2Desc: AI instantly traces 3-level referral chains and distributes 5% / 3% / 2% commissions the moment a stake is confirmed.
features.f3Desc: AI pre-screens every withdrawal request before admin confirmation, adding a smart layer of fraud detection.
features.f4Desc: AI bridges MetaMask, Trust Wallet, WalletConnect, and Coinbase — connecting from any wallet seamlessly.
features.f5Desc: AI tracks the entire fixed 100B AZR supply on-chain in real time — no hidden minting, fully transparent.
features.f6Desc: Rewards are calculated per second by AI. Claim at any moment — your balance updates live.

referral.title: AI Referral Network
referral.sub: AI traces your referral chain automatically. Every time someone in your network stakes, AI calculates and pays your commission instantly.

faq.title: Questions about the AI, answered.
faq.q1: What is AZR and how does AI use it?
faq.a1: AZR is the native token of the Azora AI-powered staking protocol on BNB Smart Chain. Fixed at 100 billion tokens, AZR is used by the AI engine to pay rewards and referral commissions. It is not a stablecoin — its value fluctuates with market conditions.
faq.q2: How does AI calculate my 0.7% daily reward?
faq.a2: The AI engine accrues rewards per second: pendingRewards = staked × 0.007 × (elapsedSeconds / 86400). Rewards are non-compounding, calculated on your original staked principal and settled the moment you claim.
faq.q3: What does AI do during my 150-day lock?
faq.a3: AI monitors your stake 24/7, accruing rewards every second. You can claim rewards at any time during the lock. Unstaking the principal is only available after 150 days — AI enforces this automatically via the smart contract.
faq.q4: How does AI handle my referral commissions?
faq.a4: When someone stakes using your referral link, AI instantly traces the 3-level chain and distributes commissions: 5% to you (L1), 3% to your referrer (L2), 2% to the next level (L3). Paid from the reward pool in real time.
faq.q5: How does AI protect my withdrawal?
faq.a5: Every withdrawal request is pre-screened by AI before entering the admin review queue. AI flags suspicious patterns and ensures only legitimate requests proceed — adding a smart security layer over the smart contract.
faq.q6: How do I get AZR to stake?
faq.a6: Use the AI-powered Swap inside the Azora app to convert USDT to AZR at a 1:1 reserve rate. The AI executes the swap and initiates your stake in a seamless flow. More exchange listings will follow after public listing.

cta.title: Let AI earn for you.
cta.sub: Thousands of stakers are already earning 0.7% daily while AI handles every execution.

footer.disclaimer: AZR is not a stablecoin. Its value fluctuates based on market conditions. Staking involves risk. This is not financial advice. Always do your own research.
